## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Connect to the MCP server on port ...
2. Send command: `{"id":"1","type":"...","params":{...}}`
3. Observe error / unexpected behavior

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages or log output.

## Environment

- **Unreal Engine version**: 5.x.x
- **UnrealMCP version**: (check `ping` response)
- **Operating System**: Windows 10/11, macOS, Linux
- **MCP Client**: Claude Code / custom script / other

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information, screenshots, or log snippets.
